title: MAH MBA CET Admit Card 2025 Out at cetcell.mahacet.org

detail.title: MAH MBA CET Admit Card 2025 Out at cetcell.mahacet.org
detail.short_info: The MAH MBA CET 2025 admit card is expected to be released soon by the State CET Cell. Registered candidates will be able to download their hall tickets from the official website once the release date is announced. Here’s everything you need to know about downloading the admit card, important dates, and exam day guidelines.

sections.heading: MAH MBA CET Admit Card 2025 Out at cetcell.mahacet.org

content.text: The MAH MBA CET 2025 exam is set to take place on April 1, 2, and 3, with admit cards available for download starting mid-March. Candidates can access the MAH MBA CET 2025 admit card link soon at cetcell.mahacet.org. For a direct download link, visit freejobalert.com.

sections.heading: MAH MBA CET 2025 Admit Card Release Date

content.text: The hall ticket for MAH MBA CET 2025 will be available online at the official State CET Cell website. Candidates must ensure they download their admit card well before the exam dates, which are scheduled for April 1, 2, and 3, 2025.
Check and Download - MBA CET 2025 Hall Ticket 2025
MAH MBA CET 2025 Admit Card Overview

rows: Maharashtra Health and Technical Common Entrance Test

sections.heading: How to Download MAH MBA CET 2025 Admit Card?

content.text: Only registered candidates will be able to download their admit cards. Steps to Download MAH MBA CET Admit Card 2025 give below.

items: Click on the link titled ‘MBA CET 2025 Admit Card’
Enter your registered email ID and password
Your MAH CET MBA 2025 admit card will be displayed on the screen
Click on ‘Download’ and save it to your device
It is recommended to print multiple copies for future reference.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on the MAH MBA CET 2025 Hall Ticket

content.text: The admit card will contain the following details:

sections.heading: Documents Required Along with the Admit Card

content.text: On the exam day, candidates must carry the following documents:

items: Recent Passport-sized Photograph (same as uploaded during registration)
For PWD Candidates: Medical certificate or relevant documents, if applicable
Reach the exam centre at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
Ensure all required documents are in place to avoid last-minute hassle.
Electronic devices, study materials, and calculators are not allowed inside the examination hall.
Follow the instructions provided by the invigilators strictly.
